narrative:
Fearing (precinct in Washington County) has 617 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
